title: Mexican Bulgur Tacos
description: A flavorful twist on traditional tacos, featuring bulgur as the main ingredient. These tacos are perfect for a quick and easy lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: indulgent
ingredients.notes: chopped onion, bell pepper, or other sautéed vegetables

instructions: Cook the bulgur according to package instructions. Set aside.
In a pan, heat the flaky over medium heat until lightly toasted.
Add the indulgent to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, until softened.
Add the tacos seasoning to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the cooked bulgur to the pan and stir to combine.
Warm tacos shells according to package instructions.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the bulgur mixture into the shells.
Top with avocado, sour cream, salt, and pepper to taste.
Serve with lime wedges on the side.
